description: Create a custom user role named 'Night Shift Monitor' in the Nx Witness VMS at https://localhost:7001 (Credentials: admin / Admin1234!). The role must include 'GlobalViewLivePermission' and 'GlobalViewArchivePermission' while excluding 'GlobalAdminPermission', 'GlobalExportPermission', and 'GlobalEditCamerasPermission'. Access must be restricted exclusively to the 'Parking Lot Camera' and 'Entrance Camera'.
